**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 incubator shell and asset-light service demotion probe. The official commercial system not only erroneously categorized it under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing,' but its business scope even includes extremely hardcore items like 'integrated circuit design, intelligent basic manufacturing equipment manufacturing, new material R&D.' However, the probe immediately locks onto its 'incubator' characteristics: paid-in capital is 3 million RMB, with only 3 insured employees. The fatal flaw is its registered address: 'Room 309, Third Floor, Jiangning High-tech Entrepreneurship Service Center.' This is a micro-enterprise affiliated within a single room on the 3rd floor of a government entrepreneurship incubation center, making it physically absolutely impossible to conduct new material processing or heavy equipment manufacturing. Peeling away these terms stacked for applying for entrepreneurship subsidies or high-tech qualifications, and combining it with the latter half of its business scope—'corporate management, supply chain management, engineering management, domestic trade agency'—the system successfully restores its true format: this is a Micro Supply Chain & Engineering Management Proxy shell, operating in the name of automation technology but actually engaged in micro supply chain management services, engineering project management, and domestic equipment trade agency. These 3 people in the incubator office touch no hardware whatsoever, strictly engaging in project matchmaking, process management, and middleman trading.
